name_en: M24723 This OnTheGo Medium Tote from the LV By The Pool collection features a woven raffia tote silhouette. It can hold a 13-inch laptop and beach towel. The bag corners are reinforced with calfskin, complemented by the circular Louis Vuitton Paris plaque. 37.5 x 30 x 17 cm (L x H x W) d.950
